name: nav_icons
description: Bottom-navigation icon set, one object per cell, same knitted family: SHOP = a wicker basket holding three colorful yarn balls; PLAY = a plump knitted round badge with a bold white play triangle; SETTINGS = a chunky gear whose body is wound yarn strands.
prompt_extra: identical rendering, outline and lighting across all three; each icon fully fills its cell height

variants.name: warm
variants.prompt_extra: slightly warmer, cozier tones and a touch more craft detail

variants.name: clean
variants.prompt_extra: slightly simpler, more minimal composition with bolder shapes
